overall.description: First-person perspective from the bridge of a vessel navigating through open water at night in a maritime simulation game. The view includes operational GPS, radar, and sonar displays with the ship's bow cutting through dark seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking open ocean

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship through open water while monitoring the radar and GPS displays, maintaining a steady course

entered.detail: illuminated display showing coastal map with Coral Sea labeling and topographical data
circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing navigation contacts
blue-tinted display showing underwater depth profile and seabed topography
white painted bow of the vessel with red navigation lights and metal railings
dark open water extending to the horizon with gentle wave formations
metal safety railing along the left side of the bridge deck
metal safety railing along the right side of the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through open water at night. Three illuminated navigation displays dominate the foreground showing GPS mapping, rotating radar, and sonar depth data. The vessel moves steadily forward through dark calm seas, with the ship's bow and safety railings framing the view. The radar sweep rotates continuously, monitoring the surrounding waters for contacts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, open sea at night. It begins with a focus on the illuminated navigation displays in the foreground, where GPS mapping, rotating radar, and sonar depth data glow against the darkness. As the vessel moves forward, the camera's view is framed by the ship's bow and safety railings cutting through the calm, black waters. The scene remains focused on this steady progression, with the continuous sweep of the radar monitoring the surrounding void for contacts.
